blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,204 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: dry, highs of 41°F, gusts to 42 mph.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
